item.title: Sports leagues race to capture Gen Z and Gen Alpha with AI, influencers and Italian brainrot
item.description: Gen Z and Gen Alpha are creating new challenges and opportunities for sports leagues and teams courting their fandom

item.title: Plight of imprisoned Hong Kong ex-publisher Jimmy Lai evokes grief over loss of press freedoms
item.description: Hong Kong's pro-democracy newspaper, Apple Daily, shut down nearly five years ago after a Beijing-imposed national security law took effect in 2020

item.title: Top Iran security official is in Oman, site of talks with the US, likely with a nuclear message
item.description: Iranian security official Ali Larijani is in Oman, the country currently mediating talks between Tehran and Washington over Iran's nuclear program

item.title: Honda reports declining profit as tariffs and EV moves hurt automaker's results
item.description: Honda has reported a 42% drop in profit for the nine months through December compared to a year earlier

item.title: Global shares mostly rise, led by a post-election rally in Japan
item.description: Global shares are mostly higher and Japan’s benchmark topped new highs after a historic election win for the nation’s first female prime minister
